nasb.text: You have also made my enemies turn their backs to me, And I destroyed those who hated me.

esv.text: You made my enemies turn their backs to me, and those who hated me I destroyed.

cnv.text: 你使我的仇敵在我面前轉背逃跑， 使我可以殲滅恨我的人。

ccb.text: 你使我的仇敌狼狈而逃， 我歼灭了恨我的人。

csbs.text: 你使我的仇敌在我面前转身而逃， 我就把那些恨我的人除尽。
